items.title: History-based regression isolation: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? Bisect examines code changes automatically and determines which developer caused a bug without a reproducible test.

feedback.correct: Correct. Provide trustworthy boundary commits and a deterministic classifier, then inspect and verify the identified commit as evidence rather than blame.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Provide trustworthy boundary commits and a deterministic classifier, then inspect and verify the identified commit as evidence rather than blame.
